name: LeaseShield
type: Tenant lease negotiation concierge (AI + human experts)
tagline: Get fair lease terms without the legalese

audience.primary: Renters in US urban markets (ages 22–45), first-time and seasoned tenants
audience.secondary: Students and families moving within 90 days
personas: Grad student unsure how to negotiate

primary_value_proposition: You upload your lease. We scan for red flags, draft winning language, and coach you to secure better terms—rent caps, fair deposit terms, and a sensible break clause.
positioning: Concierge for tenants who want leverage without conflict or legal bills
conversion_goal: Capture email, gather lease PDF, and book a 10-minute consult

microcopy: Free in 24 hours. No credit card required.

pricing.notes: Pay only if you use a paid kit. Free review stays free.

features.name: AI Lease Scan
features.details: Clause-level analysis for rent escalation, entry rights, deposits, break clauses, repairs, pets, alterations.
features.benefit: Get a clear risk score and plain-English summary in minutes—save 3–5 hours of reading fine print.

features.name: Negotiation Kit
features.details: Ready-to-send emails and clause language tailored to your lease and landlord profile.
features.benefit: Raise your odds of a win—our users secure at least one improvement 68% of the time.

features.name: Concierge Negotiator
features.details: Human experts refine your approach, script replies, and prep you for pushback.
features.benefit: Protect your approval and relationship while getting better terms—average savings $300–$1,200 over a 12-month lease.

features.name: Deposit Protection Toolkit
features.details: Move-in/out photo checklist, itemized deduction template, dispute scripts.
features.benefit: Improve deposit recovery—users report 85% fewer disputed charges.

features.name: 24-Hour Turnaround
features.details: First-pass analysis and scripts within one business day.
features.benefit: Negotiate before you sign—no delays, no missed opportunities.

objections_and_replies.reply: Most do—especially with respectful, specific language. 68% of users get at least one improvement.

objections_and_replies.objection: I don’t want to risk my approval.
objections_and_replies.reply: We sequence low-friction asks first and offer alternatives. Keep your approval while improving terms.
We translate legalese into plain English and give you copy-paste scripts.

trust_signals.privacy: 256-bit encryption. Lease files deleted on request.
